name_en: Gucci Horsebit Half-Moon Mini Saddle Bag
name_cn:
Gucci Horsebit Half-Moon Mini Saddle Bag
This little cutie is truly cute, small and well-behaved
Classic design with colorways, whether you are a trendy sporty girl 👧
Or a wise career elite, or an elegant woman of temperament
This is a suitable outfit piece for your perfect life
Classic and versatile, practical yet stylish
The 1955 series symbolizes success
Come take control of your life's direction!
Model 760191; Dimensions 17/18.5/7.5cm
